name: evidence aggregator blocks promotion when none of the supporting PRs come from a tier-1 source
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p3","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":2},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":2},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":2}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern pat.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'tier1_count=0' err.txt && grep -q 'required>=1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
